description.en: Query rows from a Supabase table with optional filters using PostgREST syntax.
description.de: Zeilen aus einer Supabase-Tabelle mit optionalen Filtern in PostgREST-Syntax abfragen.

vars.SUPABASE_KEY: env:SUPABASE_KEY|Your Supabase anon or service_role key from Project Settings > API.

inputs.name: Table
inputs.bot: The name of the Supabase/PostgreSQL table to query.

inputs.name: Select
inputs.bot: Comma-separated column names to return. Use '*' for all columns. Supports relations: 'id,name,orders(id,total)'.

inputs.name: Filter

description.en: PostgREST filter (e.g., 'status=eq.active' or 'age=gt.18'). Add as query parameter name=value.

inputs.bot: PostgREST filter syntax. Examples: 'status=eq.active', 'age=gt.18', 'name=ilike.*john*'. Multiple filters can be comma-separated.

inputs.name: Order
inputs.bot: Column to sort by with direction, e.g. 'created_at.desc' or 'name.asc'.

description.en: Maximum number of rows to return.
